close_reason: Created examples/typescript-hello/ using genrule approach. Full TypeScript support would require custom rules or worker-based integration.
description:
Create examples/typescript/hello/ with a simple TypeScript file.

Files needed:
- examples/typescript/hello/main.ts - simple hello world
- examples/typescript/hello/BUCK - appropriate target
- examples/typescript/hello/tsconfig.json (if needed)

Should work with:
- `npx ts-node examples/typescript/hello/main.ts`
- `buck2 run //examples/typescript/hello:hello`

Research needed:
- What Buck2 rules to use (js_bundle, ts_library, etc.)
- How TypeScript compilation integrates with Buck2
title: TypeScript: simple hello world example
